description.value: You don't just hum with dim light, you exude a burst of it. When you use @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Nanite Surge], you can choose to have your circuitry exude bright light in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] and dim light 10 feet beyond that for 1 round. Creatures that start their turn in the area of your bright light must attempt a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a failure, a creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Dazzled] for 1 round (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Blinded] for 1 round and dazzled for 1 minute on a critical failure). A creature can spend a single Interact action to rub its eyes to remove the blinded condition.
